commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And Ahab called Obadiah, who was the governor of his house. (Now Obadiah feared the LORD greatly: Abdias. Some suppose that he was the fourth of the minor prophets, or the husband of the Sunamitess, (4 Kings iv. ) or the third of the captains, who were ordered by Ochozias to seize Elias, 4 Kings i. (Tirinus) But this is uncertain. He took care of the persecuted prophets, (ver. ) judging it better to obey God than man.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
